tagline.zh: 记录键盘与鼠标的日常使用节奏，让健康提醒变得更自然。
tagline.en: Track keyboard and mouse habits with a gentler layer of health-aware reminders.

zh: 支持键位排行 Top 20 与鼠标明细图表
支持悬浮框位置一键回到主屏中央
支持久坐、腱鞘炎、喝水三类健康提醒
en: Added Top 20 key ranking and mouse detail charts
Added Chinese and English UI switching
Added one-click widget centering on the primary display
Added sitting, tenosynovitis, and water reminder modules
